name: high protein
explanation: Focuses on protein to build muscle and support recovery.

name: low-carb
explanation: Limits carbs and replaces them with proteins and healthy fats.

name: keto
explanation: Very low carb and high fat to put the body into ketosis.

name: vegetarian
explanation: Avoids meat and focuses on plant-based foods.

name: vegan
explanation: Avoids all animal products and uses only plant-based foods.

name: mediterranean
explanation: Emphasizes whole foods and healthy fats for heart health.

name: paleo
explanation: Focuses on unprocessed foods similar to early human diets.

name: Intermittent Fasting
foods: No specific foods but eat on the healthier side
explanation: A time-restricted eating pattern (e.g., 16:8 method) or alternate-day fasting, aimed at weight loss, metabolic health, and cellular repair.

name: DASH
foods: fresh fruits;vegetables;whole grains;sodium;no sugar;no red meat
explanation: The DASH Diet (Dietary Approaches to Stop Hypertension) was designed to lower high blood pressure and support overall health. It emphasizes fresh fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and limits sodium, sugar, and red meat.
